emails.subject: Houston visit
emails.body: Houston visit Pete, Hope you got back home OK. I am in Houston next week and wondered if I could come in and say hello and see you in action for half an hour or so? David

emails.subject: RE: Houston visit
emails.body: RE: Houston visit I am on the 32nd floor. I hear that you are visiting with our fundamental group as well. My extn is 37277. Are you staying fopr a few days? We could go for a drink if you have some time. Have a safe flight. Pete To: Keavey, Peter F.

emails.subject: RE: Houston visit
emails.body: RE: Houston visit I may be out of the office on Monday but any morning is fine. Give me a call or just stop by To: Keavey, Peter F.
